UserCardStatus.title: User Card Status
UserCardStatus.description: Tracks the review status of a specific phonogram for a user.

status.description: The current status of the phonogram card.

updatedAt.description: When the card status was last updated.

PracticeSession.title: Practice Session
PracticeSession.description: Records the results of a practice session of multiple cards.

startTime.description: The time the practice session started.

endTime.description: The time the practice session was completed.

cardCount.description: Number of cards practiced in this session.

results.description: Map representing card IDs and their final assigned statuses.

score.description: Fraction or percentage representing known vs total cards in this session.

/users/{userId}/cards/{cardId}.description: Path to a user's status for a particular phonogram card.

/users/{userId}/sessions/{sessionId}.description: Path to a user's practice session record.
